free_text: Evaporation residue formation competing with the
fission process in the Au-197+O-16,C-12 reactions and
fission barriers at a specified J window.
School of Economics, Otemon Gakuin
University, Ibaraki, Osaka, Japan
A foil stack consisting of two or three sets of a
Au target (2.0 mg/cm**2) and an Al recoil catcher
(2.0 mg/cm**2) was used.
The samples irradiated during a period of
10 min to 2 hr were measured several times over a few
weeks with a calibrated Ge(Li) or Ge(HP) detector. Si
surface-barrier detector (SSD) ,
Rotating wheel and a Si surface-barrier detector
were used for register short-lived alpha-emitters.
A mass separator (ISOL) connected to the tandem
accelerator was utilized to determine the yield ratios
between two isotopes adjoining in mass number.
By CAJAD.
.according to memo cp-d/216.
SD:Updated to new date formats,lower case.
